name: Coconut Beer Shrimp W/Sweet and Tangy Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 c fresh or moist-pack; shredded, to 2 C
recipeInstructions:
------------
Sauce:
Combine orange marmalade and Creole or Dijon mustard. Stir in shredded horseradish.
Mix eggs, beer, Creole seasoning, flour, and baking powder until well combined.
Season shrimp with remaining seafood seasoning. Dip each shrimp in beer batter, then roll in coconut.
Heat oil to 350°F (175°C) in a deep fryer, wok, or deep saucepan. The oil should be at least 1-1/2 inches deep.
Fry shrimp in batches of about six until golden brown. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
Serve hot with the sweet and tangy sauce.
